message: Migrate CLI and runtime to TypeScript

files.patch:
@@ -3,17 +3,19 @@
   "version": "1.0.0",
   "description": "CLI wrapper around OpenAI Responses API with GPT-5 Pro and GPT-5.1 high reasoning modes.",
   "type": "module",
-  "main": "bin/oracle.js",
+  "main": "dist/bin/oracle.js",
   "bin": {
-    "oracle": "./bin/oracle.js"
+    "oracle": "./dist/bin/oracle.js"
   },
   "scripts": {
-    "start": "node ./scripts/run-cli.js",
+    "build": "tsc -p tsconfig.build.json",
+    "start": "pnpm run build && node ./dist/scripts/run-cli.js",
     "oracle": "pnpm start",
     "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
     "lint": "pnpm run typecheck && biome lint .",
     "test": "vitest run",
-    "test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage"
+    "test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage",
+    "prepare": "pnpm run build"
   },
   "repository": {
     "type": "git",

@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+{
+  "extends": "./tsconfig.json",
+  "compilerOptions": {
+    "noEmit": false,
+    "outDir": "dist",
+    "declaration": false,
+    "emitDeclarationOnly": false,
+    "sourceMap": false,
+    "allowJs": false,
+    "removeComments": false
+  },
+  "include": ["bin/**/*.ts", "scripts/**/*.ts", "src/**/*.ts"],
+  "exclude": ["tests", "dist", "node_modules", ".bun-check"]
+}
